title: commerce.process_refund@2.0.0 args — floor HIGH; amount resolved from the target of record, never from args

refund_target.description: The unit being refunded, named abstractly (D-1 level-1 object). Each System accepts the type(s) it natively models and refuses the rest with UNRESOLVED/INVALID_ARGS — never a transport error.

type.description: order = order-native stores; invoice = billing systems; payment = payment processors. Calibration: the refund unit is platform-dependent (GAP-002).

id.description: Resolvable fact (§6.3) for the chosen type.

$comment: v2.0.0 (breaking): order_id replaced by the abstract refund_target object. The refundable amount is read from the target of record; a Speaker-declared amount is ignored (§6.3). Partial refunds are an Owner modification at DECIDE (§7.4).
